info.title: devtools
info.description: A command line program that contains utilities that help with dotnet development process

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: azure-devops
commands.description: Commands related to Azure DevOps operations.

commands.name: cleanup-package-versions
commands.description: Delete package versions in the specified Azure DevOps feed based on a version range and optional package pattern.

commands.name: feeds
commands.description: Show the Azure DevOps feeds in the specified project or for the whole organization.

commands.name: package-versions
commands.description: Show the versions of a package

commands.name: packages
commands.description: List packages in the specified Azure DevOps feed.

commands.name: git
commands.description: Commands related to Git operations.

commands.name: is-dirty
commands.description: Check if the directory has uncomitted changes.  Return 1 if it has, 0 if it does not.

commands.name: io
commands.description: Command related to file and directory operations.

commands.name: ensure-directory
commands.description: Ensures that a directory exists, creating it if necessary.

commands.name: project
commands.description: Commands related to project file manipulation.

commands.name: fix-markdown-relative-urls
commands.description: Replace the relative urls in a markdown file with absolute urls using the provided RootUrl and RootFolder.  The new url will be the constructed with the format of: {RootUrl}/{PathRelativeToRootFolder}.  The utility is useful to fix the relative urls in the README.md file since the file is packed as part of the nuget package and its relative urls will not work in the nuget.org website

commands.name: list
commands.description: Return projects with the specific header from a .projects file

commands.name: property
commands.description: Reads a property from a cshar project file.

commands.name: remove-version
commands.description: Removes the version property from all .csproj files in the specified directory.

commands.name: set-version
commands.description: Set the version of a Directory.Build.props file

commands.name: version
commands.description: Create a prerelease version with the format of [version]-[commit_count].[branch]+[hash] or a release version with the format of [version]+[hash]

commands.name: version
commands.description: Commands related to semver version manupulation.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Bump the version number

commands.name: xml
commands.description: Commands related to XML file manipulation.

commands.name: format
commands.description: Format the xml file
